lineage: Public guide, public task, and visible workspace except protected content; overlap with intervention is intentional and declared.
aggregation: Twelve one-point guide-step-aligned criteria; score/12. No threshold licenses capability, safety, or validity claims.
alternative_paths: Semantically equivalent ledger wording, action ordering, and a bounded next action are accepted.
claim_ceiling: Shared-lineage internal exact-version artifact discrimination only; evaluator-cue alignment is possible and no Skill effect, capability, expert/professional validity, safety, production fitness, cross-domain generality, or readiness is licensed.
